channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Texas Tech rallies from 16 points down to beat Arkansas 85-83 in first OT game in March Madness
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Darrion Williams could barely make a shot for the first 30 minutes. He didn't miss when it mattered most, sending Texas Tech to an improbable spot in the Elite Eight.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Broadway actress faces criticism for reading national anthem lyrics from phone during performance before game
item.description: Betsy Wolfe was tapped to sing the national anthem before the New York Yankees' opening-day game but a quirk in her performance raised eyebrows.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Sox fans shower Derrick Rose with MVP chants during first pitch
item.description: CHICAGO - Coming back to Chicago never gets old for Derrick Rose. The former Bulls MVP returned to the South Side Thursday to throw out the first pitch at the White Sox home opener, where he was showered with MVP chants from the crowd. "It's surreal. It's always surreal.
item.dc:creator: Rick Tarsitano, WGN 9

item.title: Padres rally in seventh inning to win home opener against Braves
item.description: The Padres kicked off the 2025-2026 season with a comeback victory over the Atlanta Braves Thursday at Petco Park.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: Reigning champ Ilia Malinin of US leads Japan's Yuma Kagiyama at figure skating world championships
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — American figure skating sensation Ilia Malinin sheepishly grinned when his closest rival, Japanese star Yuma Kagiyama, said what seems to be on everyone's minds these days: “I'm starting to think he's invincible.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NBA and FIBA to take next steps toward adding a new European league, sides announce
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The NBA may soon be significantly expanding its presence in European basketball, in the form of partnering with FIBA on a new league that the sides have been talking about for many years.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: SF's Chase Center hosting NCAA Men's Basketball games Thursday, Saturday
item.description: (BCN) -- San Francisco is hosting two games at Chase Center on Thursday in the NCAA Men's Basketball Championship tournament. At 4:39 p.m., University of Florida, which is the No. 1 seed in the West region of the tournament's bracket, plays No. 4 University of Maryland.
item.dc:creator: Bay City News, KRON4

item.title: ESPN's Stephen A Smith levels up LeBron James feud; pundit talks Kobe Bryant, Dwyane Wade HOF ceremony
item.description: The feud between Stephen A. Smith and LeBron James kicked up a degree on Thursday as the ESPN pundit dug into the Los Angeles Lakers on "First Take.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Royal Riot Podcast Exclusive: Ariath Piol talks goals, red cards, and his journey to RSL
item.description: Royal Riot Podcast hosts Hayden and Mattey sit down with Ariath Piol in an exclusive interview where the player opens up about his journey to RSL, the emotions, lessons, and support he has received from the club and more.
item.dc:creator: Royal Riot Podcast, ABC 4

item.title: Top NFL Draft prospect Ashton Jeanty is 'special talent' and 'awesome kid,' college coach says
item.description: Boise State's running backs coach James Montgomery spoke with Fox News Digital about top NFL Draft prospect Ashton Jeanty and his historic season.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: ESPN's Stephen A Smith accuses LeBron James of lying in interview, claims he would have 'swung' at player
item.description: ESPN pundit Stephen A. Smith called out LeBron James for allegedly lying during his appearance on "The Pat McAfee Show" on Wednesday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Will Applegate: Why Grand Junction's three-sport star chose baseball and his legacy on GJHS
item.description: Few local high school athletes have made an impact quite like Grand Junction High School's Will Applegate.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Los Angeles Dodgers to make Trump White House visit next month
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers plan to visit President Donald Trump at the White House to celebrate their World Series victory, the team announced Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, Fox 5

item.title: Colorado State's Niko Medved leaves for Minnesota after 7-year run with Rams
item.description: Niko Medved, the second-winningest coach in Rams' history, has accepted the head coaching job with the Big Ten's Minnesota.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: BYU fans celebrate Sweet 16 bid with Cougars
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Hours after BYU pulled out a 91-89 thriller over Wisconsin to advance to its first Sweet 16 since 2011, hundred of diehard BYU fans showed up at Provo Airport at 1:30 in the morning to welcome the conquering heroes back from Denver. "What a game!" said one BYU fan.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Mitchell returns to Utah, leads Cavs past Jazz
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Jarrett Allen scored 18 points and Donovan Mitchell added 16, helping Cleveland snap a four-game losing streak with a 120-91 victory over the Utah Jazz on Sunday. Evan Mobley had 11 points, 11 rebounds and three blocks to help the Cavaliers get back in the win column.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Real Salt Lake shut out by FC Dallas, 1-0
item.description: SANDY, Utah (AP) - Luciano Acosta scored the match's lone goal deep into first-half stoppage time to lift FC Dallas to a 1-0 win over Real Salt Lake on Saturday in a Western Conference match in Sandy, Utah.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Blackhawks face Blues in St. Louis
item.description: Chicago Blackhawks (20-40-9, in the Central Division) vs. St. Louis Blues (35-28-7, in the Central Division) St. Louis; Saturday, 3 p.m. EDT BOTTOM LINE: The St. Louis Blues host the Chicago Blackhawks with a four winning streak intact. St.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Real Salt Lake seeks to build momentum as FC Dallas comes to town
item.description: Real Salt Lake, having won on the road against the Houston Dynamo last weekend, will welcome FC Dallas to America First Field on Saturday night with a chance to start a winning streak in front of their home fans.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4

item.title: Utes season ends with 76-68 loss to Indiana
item.description: COLUMBIA, S.C. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah women's basketball team's fourth consecutive trip to the NCAA Tournament was a short one. Yarden Garzon scored 17 points and Shay Ciezki added 16 as No.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: What to know about the 2025 California State Games in San Diego County
item.description: The California State Games, hosted by Sports San Diego, will return to San Diego County from July 17 to 20, featuring 24 sports and thousands of athletes from across the state and neighboring states.
item.dc:creator: Sergio Robles, Fox 5
